property.name: projectName
property.value: Android Mobile Tests with Katalon Studio

property.name: proxyInformation
property.value: ProxyInformation { proxyOption=NO_PROXY, proxyServerType=HTTP, username=, password=********, proxyServerAddress=, proxyServerPort=0, executionList="", isApplyToDesiredCapabilities=true }

testcase.name: Test Cases/Verify Login CURA System Successfully - Mobile Browsers
testcase.classname: Test Cases/Verify Login CURA System Successfully - Mobile Browsers
testcase.system-out:
